faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in East Tremont?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in East Tremont typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method chosen. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing for all East Tremont residents.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in an East Tremont apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in East Tremont apartments take 3-6 hours for the initial service. Heat treatments can often eliminate bed bugs in a single day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to ensure all eggs and newly hatched bed bugs are eliminated. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my East Tremont home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to levels that kill bed bugs. For chemical treatments, we typically recommend leaving for 4-6 hours and ensuring pets are removed. We provide detailed preparation instructions specific to your treatment method and work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Are bed bugs common in East Tremont apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, bed bugs are a common issue in East Tremont due to the area's high-density housing and proximity to major transit lines. Bed bugs spread easily between apartment units and through shared spaces. Our team has extensive experience treating multi-unit buildings in East Tremont and can coordinate with landlords and property managers to prevent re-infestation.
